allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps root-cause-analysis trace how units interact instead of mistaking isolated symptoms for the generative driver.
allies.source_quote: RCA is an integral part of seeing the wholes and the interrelationships rather than just static snapshots.

allies.rationale_text: Decomposition gives root-cause-analysis the clean cuts it needs to expose the real driver instead of muddled symptom bundles.
allies.source_quote: Any problem of real consequence is too complicated to solve without breaking it down into logical parts.

allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking strengthens root-cause-analysis by taking nothing for granted and probing behind the first acceptable explanation.
allies.source_quote: RCA is fundamentally rooted in the critical thinking attitude of taking nothing for granted.

antagonists.rationale_text: Correlation-vs-causation is the primary logical error root-cause-analysis is designed to prevent, because it sends diagnosis after associations instead of real drivers.
antagonists.source_quote: This is the primary logical error RCA seeks to avoid. When the analyst mistakes correlation for causation, they force a relationship where none exists, inevitably causing them to chase the wrong issue and implement ineffective solutions.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias corrupts root-cause-analysis by turning diagnosis into defense of the favored story instead of open investigation.
antagonists.source_quote: RCA demands active openness to new ideas and data and a suspicion of conventional answers.

antagonists.rationale_text: Theory-induced-blindness undermines root-cause-analysis when the analyst forces a familiar frame on a novel problem and misses the real driver.
antagonists.source_quote: Applying RCA frameworks routinely and unquestioningly is dangerous because frameworks reflect mental models with embedded assumptions.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Root-cause-analysis conflicts with simplification when tracing causal chains deeper adds analytical overhead beyond the depth needed for an effective intervention.
structured_tensions.source_quote: root-cause-analysis conflicts with simplification (simplification) when tracing causal chains deeper adds analytical overhead beyond the depth needed for an effective intervention.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Root-cause-analysis conflicts with systems-thinking when single-root-cause framing misses the distributed causality typical of complex adaptive systems.
structured_tensions.source_quote: root-cause-analysis conflicts with systems-thinking (systems thinking) when single-root-cause framing misses the distributed causality typical of complex adaptive systems.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on systems, decomposition, and skeptical diagnosis allies plus conflicts with correlation-vs-causation, frame-defense, and familiar-tool misuse.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor causal sprawl beyond the source-backed diagnosis and anti-frame-distortion surface.
